title: BENSALEM POLICE LIEUTENANT SCHUM AND K9 PARTNER ASKO COMPLETE FBI K-9 MARITIME TRAINING IN NYC
summary: Bensalem Township Police Department Lieutenant Mike Schum and K-9 Asko traveled to New York City yesterday to participate in an FBI K-9 Maritime Exercise—but it looks like the real action happened after training wrapped up. K-9 Asko, a proud Philadelphia Flyers fan, took a mom...
